description: Using the Activity Browser, perform a Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) calculation for coal-fired electricity production. Create a new calculation setup in the LCA Setup area. Use the activity 'Electricity, hard coal, at power plant' from the Energy_and_Materials database as the reference flow with an amount of 1 kWh. Select any IPCC climate change method (such as IPCC 2013 GWP100) as the impact category. Run the calculation. The task is complete when LCA results are displayed showing the environmental impact score for the selected functional unit.
